name: Newton

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Newton-Wellesley Ambulatory Care Center (159 Wells Avenue)

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: community hospital plus affiliated outpatient practices
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Despite the name, the main Newton-Wellesley campus is in NEWTON. The Outpatient Surgery Center and a second Ambulatory Care Center are in Wellesley — do not attribute them to Newton. Wells Avenue is a real office park but 'Wells Avenue medical corridor' is not an established name.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
